subcodes.first_line: O Beloved of the Heart! Thy bejewelled leaf hath reached Us, and from the delicate beauty of its expressions We have inhaled the sweet fragrances of love and fellowship [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا حبیب الفواد ورقه مطرزه واصل و از لطایف عباراتش نفحات حب و وداد استشمام
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for the spiritual progress of others, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @prayer for protection, @praise and encouragement, @knowledge; recognition of God
